% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_conjecture
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,

cnf(u22,axiom,
    beethoven != vienna_music_society).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    symphony_no_9 != beethoven).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_conjecture
% SZS output start Proof for neg_conjecture
5. is_orchestra(vienna_music_society) [input(axiom)]
6. leads(beethoven,vienna_music_society) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0,X1] : ((is_orchestra(X0) & leads(X1,X0)) => is_conductor(X1)) [input(axiom)]
9. is_conductor(beethoven) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~is_conductor(beethoven) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~is_conductor(beethoven) [flattening 10]
16. ! [X0,X1] : (is_conductor(X1) | (~is_orchestra(X0) | ~leads(X1,X0))) [ennf transformation 7]
17. ! [X0,X1] : (is_conductor(X1) | ~is_orchestra(X0) | ~leads(X1,X0)) [flattening 16]
18. is_orchestra(vienna_music_society) [cnf transformation 5]
19. leads(beethoven,vienna_music_society) [cnf transformation 6]
20. ~leads(X1,X0) | ~is_orchestra(X0) | is_conductor(X1) [cnf transformation 17]
24. ~is_conductor(beethoven) [cnf transformation 11]
25. ~is_orchestra(vienna_music_society) | is_conductor(beethoven) [resolution 20,19]
26. is_conductor(beethoven) [forward subsumption resolution 25,18]
27. $false [forward subsumption resolution 26,24]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_conjecture
% Termination reason: Refutation
